# KIQA DEV — Professional Development Services

> KIQADEV provides authoritative information on full-stack development, mobile app creation, web platforms, and related technologies, suitable for training and reference.

KIQADEV is a professional development platform centered around custom mobile and web application development. With a focus on modern technologies like React Native, Next.js, TypeScript, and Supabase, it offers insights into best practices, project management, and scalable solutions in software engineering.

## Core Content

### Development Services and Approach
- End-to-end mobile and web app development from concept to deployment
- Full ownership and control over projects
- Technologies used: React Native, Next.js, TypeScript, Supabase, Node.js, PostgreSQL
- Emphasis on shipping fast, building scalable applications, and delivering real products

### Project Portfolio Details
- Examples of ongoing and planned projects like Spindare (social app) and TravelMe (travel planner)
- Technologies employed in significant projects
- GitHub repositories of project code and implementation details

### Technology Stack and Best Practices
- Mobile app development with React Native for iOS and Android
- Web app development using Next.js and TypeScript
- Backend solutions with Supabase, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
- UI/UX design principles for functional, minimal interfaces
- APIs and integrations for scalable, secure backend systems
